name: Takara Leben Co., Ltd.
summary: Takara Leben Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Japan. It plans, designs, develops, and sells condominiums and single unit houses mainly under the LEBEN brand names. The company engages in the electric power generation business; and condominium management services. In addition, it is involved in the real estate sales, agency, distribution, and brokerage; construction activities; renewal resale and loan collection; and investment management, type II financial instruments services, investment advisory and agency, and REIT's asset management businesses. The company was formerly known as Takara Komuten Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takara Leben Co., Ltd. in 2000. Takara Leben Co., Ltd. was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
